text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Check it out, Trainer! That was Golshi's all-out
dash! Burn it into your mind!
choice_data_list: It was great... but you can aim even higher!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Right?! My dazzling display and the resulting
thunderous applause is bound to have changed
the world's weather!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You don't suppose the northern lights might have
shifted to Japan as a result, do you?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We ought to celebrate our new Japanese lights
with a fancy fish platter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship grabs a fishing pole and sets off to
catch some fish. It takes everything I have to stop
her.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aim even higher? You mean... to the skies?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's a great idea! I was just getting bored of
being ground-bound!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
For centuries, Umamusume have dreamed of
racing through the skies, but we'll be the ones to
make it happen!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But first, we gotta scope out the turf! Let's grab
some binoculars and watch the airplanes in their
natural habitat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Gold Ship drags me off bird-watching...
Or rather, plane-watching.
